weather.conditions: Low clouds and fog AM, partly sunny PM — start of an extended heat wave; 30% chance of showers overnight

deal_flow.description: 186 industrial properties for sale on LoopNet — deepest Midwest inventory; watch O'Hare submarket and I-55/I-80 logistics corridor for new last-mile listings
65 industrial listings, avg ~$120/SF, avg size ~50,978 SF — strong mid-size warehouse activity along I-70/I-65
40 industrial listings near KCK, avg ~$126/SF, avg size ~26,085 SF — flex/light industrial dominates new-to-market product
Active Crexi industrial pipeline — northern KY/Cincinnati submarkets continue to benefit from CVG air-cargo and I-75 distribution demand
Crexi showing steady warehouse/flex inventory; downtown and west suburbs (West Des Moines, Grimes) remain the most-trafficked submarkets
Industrial pipeline on LoopNet — Menomonee Valley and SE WI corridor continue to see redevelopment plays
Crexi listings strong in Sarpy County and along I-80; smaller-bay industrial remains tightly held
